title: Assertion fault on an IN operator using a constant index
poc:
release (2017-05-22).
This problem was discovered by OSSFuzz.
dan added on 2017-11-06 12:01:27:
Another reproduction:
CREATE TABLE t1 ( x );
CREATE INDEX i1 ON t1 ( upper(x) );
SELECT 1 FROM t1 dfs WHERE upper(x)=1 AND upper(x) IN ('a', 'b', 'c');
key_bug_features: Index on a constant expression causes assertion fault
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1(x TEXT, y INTEGER);
SELECT 1 IN (SELECT y FROM t1 WHERE x IS NULL) FROM t1;
SELECT y FROM t1 WHERE y IN (SELECT 1 UNION SELECT 2) AND x IN ('a', 'b', 'c');
